{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Benri's staff
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri's staff]] is made of organic silver refined from mirror [[dragon]] bones and topped with blue shadow-crystal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
